title: Pot of Gold
description: Adds a literal rare pot of gold at the end of a rainbow into your game.
body:
A part of my holiday series, this one is St. Patricks Day themed with tiny leprechauns, clover and a pot of gold all added into the game at world generation.

These structures are very rare, expect to have to travel thousands of blocks between structures to find more than one per world.

Also, now with 100% more leprechauns! These little guys may look cute, but you can plan on them being a bit more on the feisty side.

Also added: 4 leaf and 3 leaf clovers which spawn exclusivly near and around these structures. These clovers can be used to make a lucky, or unlucky stew, respectively.

ADDITIONAL MOD SUGGESTIONS::

Pair this with any of my other holday mods for a festive game. 

Curernt Holiday mods include:
Holloween Craft!

Easter Eggs!

Christmas Land!

More to come.... Eventually I'll prepare a full holiday themed modpack.

OPTIONAL DEPENDENCIES:

No other mods needed

MOD PACK DEVS:
This mod is mod pack friendly, it does not alter vanilla blocks, loot or recipes in any way. You may use it in your mod packs so long as proper credit is given.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The 3 leaf and 4 leaf clovers are found only near the pot of gold. Only one 4 leaf clover will spawn, look carefully at the leaves to find it.  Both can be used to make suspisious stew by replacing the flower in the recipe with the clover. Their effects are poison and luck respectivly.

These structures are not "OP". The amount of gold is worth the effort, but not game breaking.

</details>
